case_title: ALEXIS PHYLICIA BERSONDA VS. ROMMEL MATA

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2010 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-23-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT DEBTOR APPEARED AND PAID $ 1000.00 CASH. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERSONDA, ALEXIS PHYLICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATA, ROMMEL $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,550.00, DEFENDANT NOT ORESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
